subject: Chemistry
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: 3: CHEMICAL KINETICS
topics: Chemical kinetics is the branch of Chemistry that studies, among other things, the rates at which
chemical reactions occur and the factors that influence these rates. It provides understanding of
the rate at which reactants are converted into products. Chemical kinetics is vital in a number of
fields, such as manufacturing, environmental conservation, mining, agriculture and in the
activities: chemical reactions and investigate factors that affect the rates of chemical reactions.
 Artificial Materials: Text books, science dictionary, digital devices connected to internet
assessment:  Check if learners are describing rate of chemical reaction correctly
HOOK: You are baking cookies for your school's science fair. You mix baking powder
into the dough and place your cookies in the oven. Your cookies puff up in just
minutes. When your friend uses the same amount of baking powder in her batch, her
cookies barely rise, taking over 30 minutes to show any change.
